standard_islands.label: elf_entry_context_pack
standard_islands.note: Stable standard Xtensa island inside the 0x70006794 INFO16 entry; copies preload/context fields into the a10 scratch/context object.

standard_islands.label: early_helper_dispatch
standard_islands.note: Small helper that forwards a context-derived pointer to 0x70007440 and returns 0.

instructions.effect: skip indirect call if function pointer is null
call function pointer again in the timed dispatch path
call local helper in the return path
move saved argument/result into a10 before callback

standard_islands.label: early_dynamic_dispatch_standard_island
standard_islands.note: Standard instructions visible inside extension-heavy 0x70007440; shows ccount timing and repeated indirect calls through *(a12+0).

instructions.effect: load field from returned object at a2+0x0c
load field from returned object at a2+0x00
load field from a15+0x3c before callback
clamp callback result to at most 2
save clamped callback result on stack
store clamped callback result to a4+0x00

standard_islands.label: early_dynamic_dispatch_callback_loop
standard_islands.note: Second standard-instruction island inside the 0x70007440 owner. It confirms the early dynamic dispatcher has a repeated callback/polling loop after the first return-shaped island, not just one function-pointer call.

instructions.effect: load dispatch table/context field from a8+0x2c
move callback return value into a2

standard_islands.label: dispatcher_locateBuffer_trampoline
standard_islands.note: Byte-verified standard island at the dispatcher-like locateBuffer candidate. The l32r at 0x700301e3 loads the rodata suffix `locateBuffer` from 0x70001884, then the island reaches a branch toward the 0x70030240/0x70030a0c owner and an indirect call.
